Raw_Meat.description: Meat from a recently killed animal, worth cooking first.
Raw_Meat.flavorText: Transplanted from Earth, a range of genetically modified animals thrive in the terrazone, providing an energy-dense food source.

Rope.description: Remains one of humanity\'s greatest inventions.
Rope.flavorText: A central element in crafting various construction materials and equipment.

Refined_Gold.flavorText: The existence of exotics on Icarus has demoted gold to the status of a useful, shiny metal.

Reinforced_Door.description: A heavy wooden door reinforced with iron bracing.
Reinforced_Door.flavorText: Once your structure has a doorway, this heavy door can be attached.

Recurve_Bow.description: With higher energy, recurve bows increase range and power.
Recurve_Bow.flavorText: Originating in ancient Scythia, the recurve bow stores energy more efficiently than a conventional bow, allowing for smaller, more compact weapons with an appreciable improvement in range and stopping power.

Raw_Fish.description: Will nourish, but better if cooked.
Raw_Fish.flavorText: Salmon and trout required only slight genetic adjustment to thrive in the waterways of Icarus.

Wood_Refined.description: Processed, high quality timber for construction.

Reinforced_Window.description: A braced and bolstered wooden window.

Reed_Flower.description: A wildflower reputed to have medicinal properties.
Reed_Flower.flavorText: Transplanting this reed to alien soil has altered its bioactive properties considerably.

Rain_Reservoir.description: A simple and durable way to collect rain water.
Rain_Reservoir.flavorText: Water can be consumed directly from the reservoir, or it will refill an equipped container.

DebugVikingFood.description: Meat from a recently killed animal, worth cooking first.
DebugVikingFood.flavorText: Transplanted from Earth, a range of genetically modified animals thrive in the terrazone, providing an energy-dense food source.

Reinforced_TrapDoor.description: A braced and bolstered wooden trapdoor.
Reinforced_TrapDoor.flavorText: May be attached to a floorpiece with a trapdoor accessway.

Repair_Bench.description: Repairs any item, requiring power to repair tier 4 or workshop items.
Repair_Bench.flavorText: A little duct tape, maybe some lubricant, this bench can fix anything!

Coconut_mid.description: A balance of light sustenance and moderate hydration, in a fibrous shell.
Coconut_mid.flavorText: Ripe coconuts contain a balance of thirst-quenching liquid and energy-dense, hunger satisfying flesh.

Cooked_Squash.description: Like roast pumpkin, boasting a similar flavor and most of the same effects.
Cooked_Squash.flavorText: Boosts stamina, if not the will to live.

Roasted_Vegetables.description: A melange of cooked vegetables, provides a serious stamina boost.

Faction_Mission_Radar.flavorText: This inverse synthetic aperture radar was manufactured by Larkwell Martinez, a leading defense contractor with deep ties to the ACS.

Farmers_Shotgun.description: A crude shotgun hastily pulled together
Farmers_Shotgun.flavorText: A basic addition to your arsenal

Giant_Steak.description: A giant steak from the belly of only the largest creatures.
Giant_Steak.flavorText: This should keep you going for a while

Gamey_Meat.description: Raw gamey meat, typically found amongst the more passive wildlife

Stringy_Meat.description: Stringy meat, typically found in fast, predatory creatures

White_Meat.description: A small cut of white meat

Rustic_Bench.description: A rudimentary bench from which to watch the world go by.

Rustic_Bookshelf.description: A handmade bookshelf for more storage in your home.

Rustic_Cabinet.description: A simple cabinet for all of your collections.
Rustic_Cabinet.flavorText: Reducing clutter, one knicknack at a time.

Rustic_Candles.description: A cluster of candles, with four variations.

Rustic_CoffeeTable.description: A simple coffee table for your home.
Rustic_CoffeeTable.flavorText: Don\'t put a ring on it!

Rustic_CouchLarge.description: A large and cozy couch to share.
Rustic_CouchLarge.flavorText: Or to keep all for yourself.

Rustic_CouchMedium.flavorText: It could also just be a really big armchair.

Rustic_DiningChair.description: A basic dining chair for your home.

Rustic_LivingChair.description: A comfortable armchair to relax in.
Rustic_LivingChair.flavorText: The perfect thing after a hard day of prospecting.

Rustic_NightStand.description: A basic nightstand to accompany your bed.
Rustic_NightStand.flavorText: There\'s nothing better than a complete set.

Rustic_Pot.description: A simple pot to decorate your home.

Rustic_Stool.flavorText: Perfect for reaching those higher shelves.

Rustic_TableLarge.flavorText: For when you want to throw a planetside dinner party.

Rustic_TableRound.flavorText: Perfect for planning a mission around.

Rustic_Wardrobe.description: An expansive wardrobe with three variations.
Rustic_Wardrobe.flavorText: The history of the wardrobe goes all the way back to the Romans.

Rustic_WardrobeNarrow.description: A narrower wardrobe for smaller homes, with two variations.
Rustic_WardrobeNarrow.flavorText: A smaller version but useful nonetheless.

Rustic_Bed.description: An extra sturdy and comfortable bed.

Rustic_Statue.description: A statue commemorating the discovery of Icarus with two variations.

Rustic_Dresser.description: A simple dresser for all your bedroom needs.
Rustic_Dresser.flavorText: Would probably be worth a pretty penny back home.

Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of plants from reaping.
Sickle_Attachment_Reaping_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid sickle at an Alteration Bench.

Hammer_Attachment_Repair_1.description: An attachment that increases your speed of repairs.
Hammer_Attachment_Repair_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid repair hammer at an Alteration Bench.

Feet_Hands_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_1.description: An attachment that reduces falling damage taken and chance to receive a sprain.
Feet_Hands_Attachment_Fall_Resistance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to feet or hands armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Head_Attachment_Quick_Healing.description: An attachment that improves the recovery speed of all afflictions.
Body_Head_Attachment_Quick_Healing.flavorText: Can be equipped to head or chest armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Rapid_Fire.description: An attachment that increases the speed of projectiles and your reload speed.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Rapid_Fire.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid bow.

Refined_Wood_Fishing_Rod.description: A lightweight and reliable fishing rod.

Refined_Wood_Lure.description: A sophisticated lure carefully crafted out of wood, to attract more fish.
Refined_Wood_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Reed_Flower_Lure.description: A delicate lure carefully crafted out of flowers, to attract more fish.
Reed_Flower_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Rubber_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted out of rubber, to attract more fish.
Rubber_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Rotten_Meat_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from... rotten meat.
Rotten_Meat_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Rhubarb.description: A tart and tangy vegetable with large green leaves and pink or red stalks.
Rhubarb.flavorText: Rhubarb is a good source of vitamins C and K.

Rhubarb_Stew.flavorText: Another great meal from your Potbelly Stove.

Rustic_Wood_Shelf.flavorText: A shelf made of wood, your parents will be proud.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Copper.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Copper.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Gold.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Gold.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Geode_Lamp_Rock_Oxite.description: A gorgeous rough geode lamp for your home.
Geode_Lamp_Rock_Oxite.flavorText: Bringing light, and style to your home on Icarus.

Meta_Rhubarb_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Rhubarb Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Reed_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Reed Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Raw_Wood_Sign_Trunk_B.description: A charming sign to display information on.

Raw_Wood_Lamp.description: A charming lamp that emits a cozy glow.

Roat_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Roat.
Roat_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Redback_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Redback.
Redback_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rabbit_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Rabbit.
Rabbit_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Redback_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Rabbit_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Roat_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ren.description: The main currency used by the UDA. Prospectors take on contracts to Earn this so they can purchase and upgrade gear. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.

IceMammoth_Shield.description: An impressive shield crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Shield.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

IceMammoth_Spear.description: An impressive spear crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Spear.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

IceMammoth_Throwing_Spear.description: An impressive Javelin crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: A weapon that was truly hard-won.

IceMammoth_Attachment_Melee.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Freeze on hit creatures.
IceMammoth_Attachment_Melee.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid melee weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_AlphaWolf.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with health and stamina regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_AlphaWolf.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Saddle_Racing.description: A slim sleek saddle that allows the mount to move uninhibited.

Food_Trough_Rustic.description: A Rustic looking feeder that allows multiple creatures to eat from at once
Food_Trough_Rustic.flavorText: For animals that like that rustic look.

Chicken_Head.description: A preserved memory of a feathered friend.
Chicken_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Animal_Bed_Royal.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Royal.flavorText: Treat your animal like the King or Queen they are.

Chicken_Coop.description: A place that chickens can go to feel safe, and lay eggs.
Chicken_Coop.flavorText: Built by your own hand, and it feels good.

Animal_Bed_Emperor.description: Juvenile animals can use this as a designated sleeping spot
Animal_Bed_Emperor.flavorText: Treat your animal like the King or Queen they are.

Animal_Bench.description: Specialised bench for crafting saddles, troughs, carts and various feeds.
Animal_Bench.flavorText: Your one stop show for all your animal needs.

Roast_Chicken.description: A slow roasted chicken, smells delicious.
Roast_Chicken.flavorText: Just like mama used to make.

Mission_Incubator.description: A device designed to replicate various atmospheres to allow for optimal egg growth for multiple creatures.
Mission_Incubator.flavorText: Are we seriously hatching creatures now?

Raw_Chicken.description: Raw Chicken meat harvested from a once cryogenically frozen chicken.

Quality_Fertilizer.description: Promotes recovery of Crop Quality while the Crop is Wet.

Resistance_Fertilizer.description: Helps a Crop maintain its quality during storms.

Black_Wolf_Trophy.description: A preserved Black Wolf, that once lived on Icarus.
Black_Wolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a great beast.
IceMammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

IceMammoth_Trophy_Head.description: A preserved specimen from a Rimetusk that once lived on Icarus.
IceMammoth_Trophy_Head.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Trophy_Feature.description: A preserved specimen from a Rimetusk that once lived on Icarus.
IceMammoth_Trophy_Feature.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Trophy_Chandelier.description: A preserved specimen from a Rimetusk that once lived on Icarus.
IceMammoth_Trophy_Chandelier.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Armor_Head.description: An impressive piece of armor crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Armor_Head.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Armor_Chest.description: An impressive piece of armor crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Armor_Chest.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Armor_Arms.description: An impressive piece of armor crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Armor_Arms.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Armor_Legs.description: An impressive piece of armor crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Armor_Legs.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Armor_Feet.description: An impressive piece of armor crafted from the spoils of defeating a Rimetusk.
IceMammoth_Armor_Feet.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

IceMammoth_Module.flavorText: A module which can grant envirosuits characteristics of the Rimetusk Creature.

IceMammoth_Trap.description: Snaps shut and pins anything that is ensnared for a few seconds.
IceMammoth_Trap.flavorText: Almost like a Venus Fly Trap - but with Icicles

Glass_Beam_Tempered.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Glass_Beam_Tempered.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Glass_Wall_Tempered.description: A fully transparent, mullioned wall section.
Glass_Wall_Tempered.flavorText: Throw no stones, but hold \'R\' to cycle through variants, such as doorways. Mysteriously, can be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Wall_Angle_Tempered.description: Angular inserts for gables and other tilted designs.

Glass_Ramp_Tempered.description: A transparent roof piece or ramp.
Glass_Ramp_Tempered.flavorText: Able to be repaired with a repair hammer.

Glass_Roof_Corner_Tempered.description: A transparent insert for angled roofs.

Glass_Half_Pitch_Tempered.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Glass_Halfpiece_Tempered.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Glass_Halfpiece_Tempered.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Mission_Radiator.description: A makeshift radiator made on planet for repairing a mining truck.
Mission_Radiator.flavorText: Not a traditional looking radiator but it will do the job.

Bunker_Sign.description: An old sign for the Ruaumoko Base in the Ashlands
Bunker_Sign.flavorText: It triggers reminders of road signs on Earth.

Glass_Door_Reinforced.flavorText: Like the basic glass, but tougher.

Rooster_Head.description: What remains of a feathered friend.
Rooster_Head.flavorText: No longer will this wake up nearby prospectors at 5am.

Rooster_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ram_Head.description: The remains of a majestic Ram.

Ram_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mission_Seismic_Probe.description: After a brief scan this will point towards the source of unnatural vibrations.
Mission_Seismic_Probe.flavorText: This looks cobbled together, someone is cutting some corners.

Homestead_Ranch_Sign.description: A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.

Homestead_Ranch_Gate_Sign.description: A countryside-inspired decor feature that brings character to your home.

Snow_Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a genetically spliced creature.
Snow_Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Snow_Mammoth_Trophy.description: A mounted genetically spliced Mammoth head.
Snow_Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Prop_BearTrap.description: A Rusted Iron Bear Trap - no longer functional.
Prop_BearTrap.flavorText: This would have done some damage back in its day.

Mission_DNA_Ruined.description: Result of a Failed DNA Extraction

Homestead_Retaining_Wall.description: Attaches to Dirt Foundation and Ramps to create a retaining wall.

Fertility_Serum_Chicken.description: Primes Roosters for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby chickens.

Fertility_Serum_Sheep.description: Primes Rams for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby sheep.
